opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My left eye is completely red, aching, and the light is killing me.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It started this morning as a gritty feeling and has turned into a deep ache, and now I can't stand any light — I've been sitting with my eyes shut.

symptom_narrative.character: started as a gritty, sandy feeling and has become a dull, constant deep ache behind the eye
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the ache is uncomfortable but bearable; the light sensitivity is the worst part
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: left eye only, the right eye feels completely fine
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it began, worse in bright light
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping the eye shut and staying in a dark room helps a bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: bright light makes the ache and discomfort much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no discharge or pus, no injury, nothing splashed in it, no cold or flu, the other eye is fine
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: does not recall this happening before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: keeping the eyes closed because of the light; hard to do anything in a normal-lit room

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: lower back stiffness on and off for a while
past_medical_history.how_managed: hasn't really done anything about it, just puts up with it

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: keeping the house lights dimmed and wearing sunglasses indoors to cope with the light

objective_data_offered.value: the white of the left eye looks quite red, worse around the edge of the coloured part; the right eye looks normal
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/self-video observation only — the pattern and depth of redness cannot be characterised without a slit-lamp

objective_data_offered.value: I can still see out of it, things aren't blurry as far as I can tell, but the light makes me squint
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: rough self-assessment of vision, not a measured visual acuity

objective_data_offered.value: wearing sunglasses indoors and keeping the eye shut because of light sensitivity
